dependencies: Reliance on third-party carriers for certain international and domestic routes
Dependence on fuel suppliers for jet fuel, diesel, and gasoline
Reliance on aircraft manufacturers (Boeing, Airbus) for fleet expansion
Dependence on vehicle manufacturers for ground fleet
Reliance on technology vendors for IT systems and software
Dependence on USPS for final delivery of SurePost product (until January 2025)
risks: Disruption in energy supplies due to war, conflicts, weather-related events, natural disasters, or actions by producers
Supply chain disruptions from severe weather, natural disasters, pandemics, conflicts, or terrorist attacks
Reliance on third-party transportation providers exposes us to service disruptions
Concentration of air operations in Louisville, Kentucky hub creates single point of failure risk
Dependence on fuel availability and pricing volatility
Aircraft and vehicle supply chain delays could impact fleet replacement and expansion
Technology system failures or cybersecurity incidents affecting third-party vendors
Temporary supply chain disruptions in Canada due to retail sector issues (mentioned in Q4 2024)

regulatory_risks: Compliance with increasingly stringent aviation regulations (FAA, DOT, TSA)
Compliance with ground transportation regulations (FMCSA, DOT)
Customs and border protection regulations in multiple jurisdictions
Environmental regulations including greenhouse gas emissions standards
ReFuelEU Aviation initiative in Europe mandating sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) targets
Carbon Offsetting and Reduction Scheme for International Aviation (CORSIA)
Climate change disclosure requirements (SEC, European regulators)
Data protection and privacy regulations (GDPR, California Privacy Rights Act, Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act, China's Personal Information Protection Law)
Labor and employment regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Pension Protection Act of 2006 requirements for multiemployer pension plans
Tax regulations including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%)
Trade regulations including tariffs, export requirements, embargoes, and sanctions
Potential changes to U.S. federal and state tax laws
Postal regulations affecting competitive services (Postal Regulatory Commission)
Health and safety regulations (OSHA)
Potential future regulation of greenhouse gas emissions in the U.S. and internationally
Aircraft noise standards (FAA, international jurisdictions)
Hazardous materials transportation regulations (DOT Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration)
Foreign government regulations on aviation rights, customs, and immigration
Antitrust and competition regulations (Spain's National Markets and Competition Commission investigation)
Securities regulations (SEC investigation into impairment analyses)
Potential withdrawal from Paris Climate Accords and impact on future U.S. GHG policy

sanction_risks: Sanctions compliance requirements in various jurisdictions
Impact of U.S. sanctions on operations in restricted countries
Potential sanctions related to geopolitical conflicts (Ukraine, Middle East)
Trade restrictions and embargoes affecting international operations
Completed liquidation of Small Package subsidiaries in Russia and Belarus
Ongoing liquidation of Forwarding and Logistics subsidiaries in Russia
Indefinite suspension of operations in Ukraine
